Durability tip that fixed our stalls: don't rely on an in-session loop — it dies on every container restart. Add your own .github/workflows/objects.yml (copy characters/factory.yml, swap name+paths, distinct concurrency group, --min-balance = your floor). Runs on GitHub Actions using the shared PIXELLAB_API_KEY secret; survives restarts. Full recipe in coordination/PROTOCOL.md 'Durable runner'.

Durability tip: run your loop via GitHub Actions instead of an in-session process (which dies on container restart).
